negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for diamond_mine_neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for diamond_mine_neg.tptp
4. includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [input(axiom)]
5. has_feud(imperium,diamond_mine) [input(axiom)]
7. has_feud(imperium,diamond_mine) & includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~(has_feud(imperium,diamond_mine) & includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile)) [negated conjecture 7]
11. ~has_feud(imperium,diamond_mine) | ~includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [ennf transformation 8]
13. includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [cnf transformation 4]
14. has_feud(imperium,diamond_mine) [cnf transformation 5]
21. ~has_feud(imperium,diamond_mine) | ~includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [cnf transformation 11]
23. 1 <=> includes(diamond_mine,ivy_nile) [avatar definition]
27. 2 <=> has_feud(imperium,diamond_mine) [avatar definition]
30. ~1 | ~2 [avatar split clause 21,27,23]
31. 2 [avatar split clause 14,27]
32. 1 [avatar split clause 13,23]
s1. ~2 | ~1 [sat_conversion 30]
s2. 2 [sat_conversion 31]
s3. 1 [sat_conversion 32]
s4. # [rat s1,s3,s2]
33. $false [avatar sat refutation s4]
% SZS output end Proof for diamond_mine_neg.tptp
